name: deeppurpose_dti
summary: Given one drug SMILES string and one target protein amino-acid sequence, predict their binding affinity (pKd) using a shipped pretrained deep DTI model — no training required.

name: equidock_rigid_docking
summary: Given two unbound protein PDB structures (a randomly rotated/translated ligand and a receptor), predict the rigid docking pose (rotation + translation) that assembles them into a bound complex, output as a transformed ligand PDB.

name: danq_inference
summary: Given 1000-bp one-hot DNA sequences, run pretrained DanQ inference to predict the 919-dim chromatin-feature profile (TF binding, DNase hypersensitivity, histone marks) for each sequence.

name: deepfri_mf
summary: Given a single protein's C-alpha contact map + sequence (or just sequence), predict its Gene Ontology molecular-function terms with confidence scores using the pretrained structure-based graph convolutional network.
notes: re-verified in snapshot after interpret_smoke noise fix

name: equibind_blind_docking
summary: Given one apo/holo protein .pdb and one small-molecule ligand file, predict the ligand's bound 3D pose (blind docking) and write it as a docked .sdf.

name: trrosetta_predict
summary: Given a protein multiple-sequence alignment (A3M), predict the full set of inter-residue geometry probability maps (distogram + omega/theta/phi anglegrams) using the pretrained trRosetta network, reproducing the shipped reference prediction for the example target T1001.
notes: re-verified in snapshot after interpret_smoke noise fix

name: unirep_get_rep_64
summary: Turn a single protein amino-acid sequence (e.g. avGFP) into UniRep's fixed-length learned representation vector (64-dim from the 64-unit model, or 1900-dim from the full model) via the pretrained mLSTM babbler.
notes: re-verified in snapshot after interpret_smoke noise fix

name: scgen_cd4t_perturbation
summary: Given the Kang PBMC scRNA-seq dataset with CD4-T stimulated cells held out, train scGen and predict the IFN-beta stimulation response of CD4-T cells, matching the real held-out stimulated profile.
Predict continuous drug–target binding affinity from a drug SMILES string (molecular graph) plus a protein amino-acid sequence, using a graph neural network (GINConvNet) trained on the Davis dataset.

name: tape_transformer_embed
summary: Given a fresh protein amino-acid sequence in FASTA, produce its learned per-residue and pooled embedding vectors using the pretrained TAPE Transformer (bert-base) protein language model.

name: deepdta_davis_affinity
summary: Drug-target binding affinity (CNN) trained on Davis (no released weights).
notes: train-required (no released weights) — trained 15 epochs after solving the Ampere/cuDNN wall via nvidia-tensorflow 1.15. 6.2h / $8.77, far over the 90-min cap (the async timeout didn't hard-kill the in-container training).
